# Change history — article-generate-techsession-analysis.prompt

## v2.2.0 — 2026-02-14

Fixed typos — 'a in-dept' → 'an in-depth', 'enfasis' → 'emphasis'

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added Phase 4 (Content Enrichment) — enriches key concepts with verified background context for readability

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Renumbered Phase 4-7 → Phase 5-8 to accommodate new phase

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Updated boundaries — added enrichment callout rules to Always Do and Never Do

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Updated Phase 7 (Document Assembly) to reference enriched content from Phase 4

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Updated Phase 8 (Quality Check) with enrichment validation steps

## v2.1.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Updated output template with CONTENT ENRICHMENT guidance and callout block example

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Major rewrite — removed all redundancies from v1

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Moved templates to dedicated folder .github/templates/01.00-article-writing/article-generate-techsession-analysis/

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Changed from thematic to CHRONOLOGICAL time-based analysis structure

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added explicit demo → appendix routing (brief mention in main + appendix for detail)

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added tangential content → appendix routing

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added 7-phase workflow covering full analysis lifecycle

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added Phase 4 (Reference Enrichment) for external reference discovery

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Added Response Management, Error Recovery, and 5 Embedded Test Scenarios

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Removed duplicate System Message / Input Sources / User Input / Goal / Output / Quality sections

## v2.0.0 — 2025-12-14T00:00:00Z

Removed web_search from tools (using fetch for reference verification)
